---
title: "Publications"
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../_ejs/publications.ejs
  contents:
    - "*/index.qmd"
    - "!_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  sort-ui: false
  page-size: 30
  filter-ui: true
  categories: true
  fields: [image, pub_number, title, author, journ, volume, issue, page, year, date, url_source, haiku, categories]
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

## Journal Covers

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![](covers/2023-010-AFM.jpg){group="covers" height=200px}
:::

## Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
